task_description: Phase 13: QuantMail GitHub Killer - Real Git Hosting + AI DevTools. Adds git hosting backend service with Smart HTTP protocol, Prisma models for repositories/PRs/issues/CI, PR/Issue/Review/BranchProtection services, CI runner service, AI DevTools (code review, commit messages, PR descriptions, CI fix, code search, security scan), and routes for all operations.

verification.summary: 100/101 test files pass (1068 tests). Only failure is pre-existing shared-ui DOM environment issue (26 tests). All Phase 13 tests pass: 45 git-server + 47 PR/issue/review + 58 CI/AI devtools + additional route and review-fix tests. Semantic review issues all addressed in fix commit.
